tasks.subject: Task 0: Add Vitest to desktop
tasks.description: Working unit-test runner. Files: apps/desktop/package.json, vitest.config.ts, ai/__tests__/smoke.test.ts. Verify: pnpm --filter @openappstore/desktop test

tasks.subject: Task 1: AI types + settings store
tasks.description: Typed AI settings → userData/settings.json (ai key). Files: ai/types.ts, ai/settings.ts(+test).

tasks.subject: Task 2: Binary detection
tasks.description: Resolve provider binary: override→PATH→common dirs. Files: ai/detect.ts(+test).

tasks.subject: Task 3: Claude adapter
tasks.description: ProviderAdapter for claude (lift current logic). Files: ai/adapters/claude.ts(+test).

tasks.subject: Task 4: Codex adapter
tasks.description: codex exec --json → ChatEvent. Verify field names vs live output. Files: ai/adapters/codex.ts(+test).

tasks.subject: Task 5: opencode adapter
tasks.description: opencode run --format json → ChatEvent; temp read-only config. Files: ai/adapters/opencode.ts(+test).

tasks.subject: Task 6: Registry + runAgent
tasks.description: Resolve active adapter+binary, run turn, friendly error. Files: ai/registry.ts, ai/run.ts(+test).

tasks.subject: Task 7: Shell IPC for AI settings
tasks.description: aiGet/aiSet/aiDetect/aiTest IPC + preload + shared DTOs. Files: main/index.ts, preload/shell.ts, shared/types.ts, shared/ai-types.ts.

tasks.subject: Task 8: Settings UI modal
tasks.description: Shell Settings modal: active provider, path+model, Probar. Files: renderer/components/SettingsModal.vue, App.vue. Verify manual.

tasks.subject: Task 9: Migrate sendChat to runAgent
tasks.description: sendChat drives configured provider; AgentHandle; preserve done post-processing. Files: main/authoring.ts.

tasks.subject: Task 10: Decks in userData
tasks.description: presentationsDir→userData; seed example; ship template/blocks/engine/examples. Files: authoring.ts, index.ts, electron-builder.yml, presenter/examples.

tasks.subject: Task 11: Runtime deck compiler
tasks.description: compileDeck → ESM deck.js, externalize vue+engine (esbuild + @vue/compiler-sfc). High-risk; prefer maintained esbuild vue plugin. Files: presenter-build/compileDeck.ts(+test).

tasks.subject: Task 12: Host modules (vue+engine)
tasks.description: Page provides vue+presenter-engine to compiled deck via import map→blob. Files: presenter/src/runtime/hostModules.ts, main.ts.

tasks.subject: Task 13: Load compiled decks
tasks.description: Replace import.meta.glob with compiled deck.js loading; broker compiledDeckUrl. Files: presentations/index.ts, main.ts, authoring.ts, broker.ts, sdk.

tasks.subject: Task 14: Packaged-capable preview
tasks.description: Compiled-deck preview; getPreviewUrl works packaged; reload after turn. Files: authoring.ts, LivePreview.vue, CodeEditor.vue, sdk.

tasks.subject: Task 15: Compile in edit loop + e2e verify
tasks.description: Recompile after turn; full packaged e2e per provider. Files: authoring.ts. Verify: pnpm package + manual.
